title: Customizing dependency column does not work
excerpt:
Hi, 
I m trying to customize “dependency” column by selecting the column >> Settings>> Customize dependency column but the customization screen does not pop-up. 
Any idea? 
By the way it does not seem to be a permission …

posts.author: Nilis (Nili Singer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I m trying to customize “dependency” column by selecting the column >> Settings>> Customize dependency column but the customization screen does not pop-up.
Any idea?
By the way it does not seem to be a permission problem because I am the admin.
Thanks,
Nili

posts.author: diana45peters (Diana Peters)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, wellnow com
I m trying to customize “dependency” column by selecting the column >> Settings>> Customize dependency column but the customization screen does not pop-up.
Any idea?
By the way it does not seem to be a permission problem because I am the admin.
Thanks,
Nili

Hi Nili,

I understand how frustrating that can be! Since you’re the admin and it’s not a permission issue, it might be glitch. Have you tried clearing your browser cache or using a different browser? Sometimes that can help.
Does that help?
